subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath opened the closed doors and guided His chosen ones and loved ones unto the straight path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را که درهای بسته را گشود و اولیا و اصفیایش را راه نمود و بصراط مستقیم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
